Dagarn's Tail  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +20
Effect: Fire Bolt (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Dagarn's Tail
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 HP: +75
SV FIRE: +20
Effect: Fire Bolt (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Smari
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 08:20:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Dagarn the Destroyer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded July 4th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated July 5th, 2022

Post Comment
awesome weapon
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 4:50 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592256397633
2 posts
just got this tonight only used it for half an hour or so b4 i logged but it was awesome,to the guy who said he prefers a fleshgrinder you only have to look at the ac on this weapon to see that the tail is vastly superior.

stamford bridge,

lvl 56 warrior from venril sathir
▲ Page top
off the subject
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2002 at 5:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570673118
11 posts
this is kinda off the subject but, how do i make a magelo profile? isnt this wepon awesome! would love to get one of them =^)
▲ Page top
RE: off the subject
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 5:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759644048
44 posts
its quite simple
go to http://www.magelo.com/ (id tyoe it up in your toolbar if you dont want a pop up) and click, I beleive, Sign Up (havent been there in awhile) then get in, and at the bottom, on the toolbar (whatever, menu on the left) there are 2-3 more options to choose, one will be like configure characters. Click that, manage your character, and ctrl + c the location of when you enter "view my profile" at the bottom of the configure screen. I dont know if this is exactly how to do it, but I think its close. Good luck!

normally i just post stupid "monk item" things :P

QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 11:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342811123
View User Forum
Scholar
9,575 posts
Sure, it's heavy. Sure, there are probably better Warrior weapons out there, both in terms of dam/delay and taunting. And sure, I would LOVE to get this. I hear all you high levels griping about how this weapon isn't great, but I would personally volunteer to goto Greater Faydark and PK 300 elves to get this (I play on Vallon Zek... hehe) I WANT THIS TAIL!

▲ Page top
Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 7:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761539110
22 posts
Okay, now I'm not sure this Dagarn fellow is a dragon, but being Temple of Veeshan I'm going to take a wild guess and say it is. In which case, I seriously doubt a dragon's tail is going to make this nice of a whip. I picture a dragon's tail I think of something big, unwieldy, and takes two or three good wind-ups to get a good spin going. I guess I can see the AC though. Try wrapping a big scaly bit around you and tell me it doesn't provide some protection.
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2002 at 1:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757113487
Scholar
119 posts
take the tail, rip off 5-7 strips of skin about 20-30 ft long, tan it, braid it, just like a bullwhip. your not using the tail, just the perfect and flexible parts of it.

it's just that when you loot it, they assume it's what ya do.

see, that's how ya wield a dragon's tail.
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 8:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well, I wonder what insane person would equip a giantpiece of armor....thats the same thing. :)

Would be kinda funny to see a hobbit put a helmet on that he can use as home.
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 10:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750976102
281 posts
isnt it possible to use just the tip of the tail and not the whole 35 feet of it? i mean none of us have actualy killed a dragon b4 and then cut its tail off then cured it like you would in RL(if there were such things as dragons)
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 2:02 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249461149
62 posts
Heh, I own two Savannah Monitors. A 4.5 foot female and a 2 foot juvenile male, their main defense against predators is their tail. With the other large monitors (Nile and River) they stun/kill prey with their tails. If you have ever seen a giant lizard smacking a mouse or rat around it's cage with its' tail, you would have no problem picturing someone taking a six foot piece of lizard tail and dishing out a boney, scaly, meaty whupping with it.
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 2:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249788549
41 posts
I am inclined to agree with Blaine, I have a 6 foot female Iguana and she can dish out some mean punishment with her tail when scared/threatened. While this has very little or no relation to EQ, I can plainly see how the tip of a magically endowed dragon tail could make a dangerous weapon when wielded by a hearty warrior...
▲ Page top
RE: Dragon's Tail?
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 4:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
